body:
Full record: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CLAUDE_ECONOMICS_AUDIT_2026-06-13.md

VERDICT: APPROVE for ACTIVE documentation status. No gate crossed; safety spine sound.

PatchPlan (wording hardening, optional, pre-runtime-promotion):
E1 (MEDIUM): 'Economic Constitution' title + canon read-order placement implies binding law while body says 'no runtime authority'. In README canon block, label §3a as ACTIVE documentation floor, not runtime-enforced law; keep 'no runtime authority' as the doc's first line.
E2 (LOW): bind icp_posture='governance candidate' to approval_gate='owner exact approval + legal + security' (SNS transfer is irreversible) — make the dependency explicit in AUTOPOIESIS_ECONOMICS_POLICY handoff addendum.
E3 (LOW): add to Rule 6 — 'ΣCredit never leaves the local ledger; no conversion to fiat, crypto, or ICP tokens.'

CAVEAT: I verified statically (mount-stable). Post-crash sandbox staleness blocked my dynamic re-run; please re-confirm economics 5 OK / suite green in a fresh sandbox.
objective: Economics promotion audit — APPROVE (docs-only) with 3 wording-hardening items
summary: Safety/token/SNS/ICP/role posture sound. ΣCredit non-tradable+non-token, SNS/mainnet/public-claim owner+legal+security gated, ICP bounded, envelope not widened. 3 wording recs (1 MEDIUM).
